summary: Applied the round-0 ad-hoc review findings across the shared review, learning, and component-repair runtimes plus agent-role-builder. The main changes aligned terminal statuses, centralized shared workflow helpers, strengthened validation and audit evidence, added KPI/audit fields, and switched role generation to the shared component-repair-engine.
highlights: Added frozen_with_conditions to the shared contract and all live status unions.
Added explicit board handling for resume_required and frozen_with_conditions.
Added material-only freeze gating and final-round ultimatum handling.
Routed board prompt construction through the shared review engine.
Added artifact_refs, fallback provenance, and arbitration tracking to audit outputs.
Added fail-closed governance validation and required review config loading.
Added shared code-review contract/prompt and the ad-hoc review round runner.
